sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Zankhat Topa khasiangtho in keihong lawng a,
Gamnuam khat hongmusak hi,
Luangsial sialtui, nimdildial singcinpal silsial,
Vasa te'n zong lungdam lasa in leng liai liai.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Zingdam huihnung hiau hiau,
Paak namtui tawh dim na Van misiangtho te len na,
A taang kham khuapi nuam, Kaluah nading mun hi,
(Te diamdiam ding misiangte aksi bang taang ding)2

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: .Tua laitak vanpan langaihpi hongging ziah ziah,
Topa sapna kaza hi,
Khitui luangin kanunna hong kikhel pah a, Lungdam in Zeisu angsung kadelh vingveng ta,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Gamsa te'n zong tuiluang sial sial a lunggulh bang,
Topa nang kong lunggulh hi,
Nang omnapeuh kakha lungdam in nuamsa hi,
Leitung nate'n hongkhih hong buaisak zonawnlo,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Tua gam munnuam lungsimin ka ngaihsut kik ciang,
Gensiam hileng a hoih dan,
A nopdan Vangam a lim leh a vang bek hi,
Bang zah'n a nuam diam tuamun ihtun hun ciangin.
Zingdam huih nung hiau hiau,
Paaknamtui tawn dimna,
It leh ngaih teng tual len na,
Zeisu khut kalending,
Ka nu'n hongmuak ding a
(Tee diam diam ding misiangte aksi bang tang ding)
